description_long: This is a rustic wooden chair with a simple, traditional design, featuring a slightly curved backrest composed of vertical slats that are evenly spaced and connected to a rounded top rail. The seat is flat and rectangular with softly rounded edges, showing a visibly worn wood grain texture. The chair stands on four sturdy, slightly tapered legs that are angled outward for stability. There are no armrests, giving it an open and accessible appearance. The finish is matte, with a dark brown color that highlights the natural wood grain and imperfections, suggesting it is well-used or intentionally distressed. This chair would be suitable for use in parks, outdoor cafes, or urban public seating areas.
description: A rustic, dark brown wooden chair with a slatted backrest, flat seat, and four angled legs, featuring a worn wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical slatted backrest and the full width of the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat seat, the thickness of the wood, and the backward angle of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved top rail and the arrangement of the backrest slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the seat profile and the rearward slant of the backrest.
